verses.1: LORD, you God to whom vengeance belongs,
verses.2: Rise up, you judge of the earth.
verses.3: LORD, how long will the wicked,
verses.5: They break your people in pieces, LORD,
verses.6: They kill the widow and the alien,
verses.7: They say, “The LORD will not see,
verses.8: Consider, you senseless among the people;
verses.9: He who implanted the ear, won’t he hear?
verses.10: He who disciplines the nations, won’t he punish?
verses.11: The LORD knows the thoughts of man,
verses.12: Blessed is the man whom you discipline, LORD,
verses.13: that you may give him rest from the days of adversity,
verses.14: For the LORD won’t reject his people,
verses.15: For judgment will return to righteousness.
verses.16: Who will rise up for me against the wicked?
verses.17: Unless the LORD had been my help,
verses.18: When I said, “My foot is slipping!”
verses.19: In the multitude of my thoughts within me,
verses.20: Shall the throne of wickedness have fellowship with you,
verses.21: They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous,
verses.22: But the LORD has been my high tower,
verses.23: He has brought on them their own iniquity,
